title: KAMANINA 22 mm Diameter Curtain Pole 80 to 148 cm, Antique Silver Curtain Poles for Eyelet Curtains, Extendable Curtain Pole with Brackets, Curtain Rod for Windows with Netted Texture Finials
features: 𝗦𝗽𝗹𝗶𝗰𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝗔𝗻𝗱 𝗧𝗲𝗹𝗲𝘀𝗰𝗼𝗽𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝗗𝗲𝘀𝗶𝗴𝗻: This curtain poles can be adjusted from 80 to 148 cm and apply to window sizes from 50 to 138 cm

𝗦𝘁𝗮𝗯𝗹𝗲 𝗔𝗻𝗱 𝗗𝘂𝗿𝗮𝗯𝗹𝗲: The curtain pole features an outer pole with a diameter of 22 mm (7/8 inches) and an inner rod with a diameter of 19 mm (3/4 inches) and a thickness of 0.6 mm. It supports up to 22 lbs, which ensures stability and durability

𝗘𝘅𝗰𝗹𝘂𝘀𝗶𝘃𝗲 𝗗𝗲𝘀𝗶𝗴𝗻: Our curtain rods feature a unique mesh textured lace that provides stunning visual enjoyment and an exclusive look. The poles are captivating and available in classic colors to match any furnishing style
𝗦𝗹𝗶𝗱𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝗗𝗲𝘀𝗶𝗴𝗻: Unlike traditional splicing and telescoping curtain poles, these rods have no steps between sections, so the grommets won't get caught or snap into place when the curtains are moved

𝗘𝗮𝘀𝘆 𝗜𝗻𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗹𝗹𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻: The curtain rod comes with all the necessary mounting hardware, including brackets, screws, anchors, and instructions. You can easily install the pole in just a few steps and minutes
